summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard capture of a strong late‑'81 show highlighted by a killer Sailor > Saint segue and sweet Spanish Jam/Wharf Rat pair.
review: The recording is an excellent, well‑balanced soundboard that presents every instrument cleanly, especially Phil’s bass. Musically the concert shines with a rare Lost Sailor > St. of Circumstance closeout to the first set and standout performances of Sailor > Saint, Spanish Jam into Wharf Rat, Must Have Been the Roses and Candyman, delivering a consistently engaging flow.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers praise both the musical performance and the crystal‑clear soundboard recording; weighting of show (70 %) and recording (30 %) yields a high overall rating despite one very low star score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as crystal clear, well‑balanced with every instrument audible; no reported dropouts or muffiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A rare Lost Sailor > St. of Circumstance closeout gives way to a strong second set; transitions are praised and pacing is described as excellent.

band_member_comments.Phil: His bass is clearly audible in the mix, which is notable for early ’80s soundboard recordings.
